title: Senior Financial Analyst - Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd - Immediate Joiners Preferred
company: Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Chandigarh location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd!
